import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import './Header.css' export default () => { window.onscroll = function () { scrollFunction() }; function scrollFunction() { if (document.body.scrollTop > 200 || document.documentElement.scrollTop > 200) { document.getElementById("header").style.background = "red"; document.getElementById("intro").style.visibility = "hidden"; } else { document.getElementById("header").style.background = "transparent"; document.getElementById("intro").style.visibility = "visible"; } } return (
